content.text: two standing rules for this repo: always use python3 and pip3 explicitly (never bare python/pip — the boxes have both installed), and never commit directly to main, everything goes through a PR branch
Understood — python3/pip3 explicitly, and all changes via PR branches, no direct commits to main. Noted as standing workflow rules for mailroom.
also status update: we finished migrating the mailroom queue worker off the old redis box onto the new kafka cluster yesterday, the redis box delta-2 is decommissioned as of today

Got it: as of 2026-06-25 the mailroom queue worker runs on the kafka cluster, migration off redis complete, and the old redis box delta-2 is decommissioned. Anything still pointing at delta-2 should be treated as a bug.
right. verify the worker is actually consuming from kafka before we close this out
